{{Quote|I've just received a report of TIE fighters scouring the asteroid belt near Sullust. They're searching for us everywhere.|[[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]|<ref name="Darklighter">[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]]</ref>}}
'''Sululluub''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Sullust (star)|Sullust]] in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]]. It was located in the [[Brema sector/Legends|Brema sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] were sent to search for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] in the asteroid belt.<ref name="Darklighter" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
*[[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] {{Imo}}
